pack.name: Dryer Vent Maintenance
pack.description: Lint trap, dryer duct, and exterior vent maintenance for safer drying.
pack.author: Home Maintenance Manager

tasks.name: Deep clean dryer lint trap
tasks.description: Wash lint screen and clear lint from the trap cavity.
tasks.instructions: Wash the lint screen to remove residue, let it dry, and vacuum inside the lint trap cavity.

tasks.name: Clean dryer vent duct
tasks.description: Remove lint from the dryer duct and exterior vent.
tasks.instructions: Unplug the dryer, disconnect the duct, clean lint from the duct and exterior hood, reconnect securely, and test airflow.

tasks.name: Inspect exterior dryer vent flap
tasks.description: Confirm the exterior vent opens freely and is not blocked.
tasks.instructions: Check that the vent flap opens while the dryer runs and is clear of lint, nests, snow, or landscaping.
